module.name: tool
module.purpose: Standalone marix-host-tool bin crate. Every native tool compiles into its own executable that shares one tool_main.rs entry and is selected at compile time through the cfg-gated SelectedTool alias behind Cargo features. tool.rs defines ToolProgram, the interface each tool program implements; native/ owns the concrete tool programs. tool_main.rs is the shared binary entry whose main runs the compile-selected tool through a private run<T: ToolProgram> that reads process arguments and speaks the --preview/--run JSON protocol over stdout. lib.rs and the Cargo manifest are namespace/re-export wiring and package metadata only.

childModules.name: native
childModules.purpose: Concrete native tool programs grouped by category: filesystem tools under file/ and shell command execution under shell/.
